question: [File: 'File Name: rest/constants.js -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Symbol: filterKeys.SERIAL_NUMBER] Can an unprivileged external user supply a `serialnumber` filter value of 0 (zero) to an NFT history endpoint, causing the query to return all NFTs with serial number 0 (which may be a sentinel or uninitialized value), exposing historical NFT records that should not be accessible?
